name: Joinsoon Electronics Manufacturing CO., LTD.
summary: Joinsoon Electronics Manufacturing CO., LTD. designs, manufactures, and sells interconnection products worldwide. The company offers precision components, including antennas, cables, and connectors, as well as noninvasive consumable cables, customized cable assemblies, fly-lights, infrared surveillance camera cable assemblies, and CDRW and multimedia cables. It also provides electronics products, such as storage, VoIP and HDMI series, and OEM and ODM products. In addition, the company offers healthcare management products comprising infrared ear and digital thermometers. Further, it provides product consultation and technical support services that include product design and development, procurement and sourcing, and manufacturing and engineering support, as well as design manufacturing services; and electronics manufacturing services. The company was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
